'''fawawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uzi|uzi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uzi|uzi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fawawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæwæwæth|fæwæwæth]] || [[word:fæwæwæj|fæwæwæj]] || [[word:fæwæwæsh|fæwæwæsh]] || [[word:fæwæwæ|fæwæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fawawawath|fawawawath]] || [[word:fawawawaj|fawawawaj]] || [[word:fawawawash|fawawawash]] || [[word:fawawawa|fawawawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fawawath|fawawath]] || [[word:fawawaj|fawawaj]] || [[word:fawawash|fawawash]] || [[word:fawawa|fawawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fawafwath|fawafwath]] || [[word:fawafwaj|fawafwaj]] || [[word:fawafwash|fawafwash]] || [[word:fawafwaf|fawafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fawawatha|fawawatha]] || [[word:fawawaja|fawawaja]] || [[word:fawawasha|fawawasha]] || [[word:fawawaka|fawawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fawawath|fawawath]] || [[word:fawawaj|fawawaj]] || [[word:fawawash|fawawash]] || [[word:fawawa|fawawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fawawathal|fawawathal]] || [[word:fawawajal|fawawajal]] || [[word:fawawashal|fawawashal]] || [[word:fawawakal|fawawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fawawathatha|fawawathatha]] || [[word:fawawajaja|fawawajaja]] || [[word:fawawashasha|fawawashasha]] || [[word:fawawaka|fawawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fawawathan|fawawathan]] || [[word:fawawajan|fawawajan]] || [[word:fawawashan|fawawashan]] || [[word:fawawakan|fawawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fawawathaoro|fawawathaoro]] || [[word:fawawajaoro|fawawajaoro]] || [[word:fawawashaoro|fawawashaoro]] || [[word:fawawakaoro|fawawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
